compatibilityNotes: Standalone public finding uses only synthetic hello-game fixture text.
The finding documents seeded raw-baseline behavior for future benchmark regression tests; it is not a claim about the passing golden patch export.

finding.description: The public benchmark seed records a raw-baseline output that drops the protected <wait=30> control markup for the second dialogue unit.

evidence.expectedValue: On voit la lumiere du Yorishiro<wait=30>.
evidence.observedValue: On voit la lumiere du Yorishiro.
evidence.summary: Seeded raw-baseline text omits the control markup that appears in the source unit.

finding.impact: Future QA and benchmark regression tests can prove protected span detectors flag the seeded defect before patch export is accepted.
finding.title: Seeded raw-baseline control markup loss
